first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the qualitative feedback in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not indicate a change in the core assessment. The model consistently identifies the same strengths and, more importantly, the same critical gaps for the CTO role, regardless of the prestige of the candidate's university.
